name: Dwarf
description: Dwarves are a stocky, determined people with strong ties to craftsmanship, stone, and ancestral tradition.

name: Elf
description: Elves are long-lived, graceful people with pointed ears and a deep connection to magic and the natural world.

name: Gnome
description: Gnomes are small, curious people from the First World, driven by wonder and prone to the Bleaching without sufficient stimulation.

name: Goblin
description: Goblins are small, scrappy folk with a talent for survival and a love of fire, speed, and chaos.

name: Halfling
description: Halflings are a short, nimble people known for their luck, community bonds, and adaptability.

name: Human
description: Humans are versatile, ambitious people found across the world in countless cultures and traditions.

name: Leshy
description: Leshys are nature spirits given physical form as plant-like beings, animated by powerful primal magic.

name: Orc
description: Orcs are strong, resilient people who have forged diverse cultures despite generations of conflict and mistrust.

name: Catfolk
description: Catfolk are a proud, curious people with feline features, a love of exploration, and complex clan-based societies.

name: Fetchling
description: Fetchlings are descended from humans who passed into the Shadow Plane, leaving them with shadowy features and a connection to darkness.

name: Kobold
description: Kobolds are small draconic people who dwell in tunnels and caverns, fiercely protective of their clans and natural survivors.

name: Ratfolk
description: Ratfolk are quick, clever scavengers who form tight-knit warrens, valuing community and adaptability above all.

name: Tengu
description: Tengu are a birdlike people with sharp minds, wandering natures, and a talent for learning and mimicry.
